message:
fix: Make test group loading failures fatal to prevent running all tests

Problem: When @group syntax fails to load (e.g., @windows on Windows),
the test runner silently continues with empty pattern list, causing ALL
390 tests to run instead of the intended subset.

Changes:
- Changed printWarn → printError for group load failures
- Changed continue → return (fatal error, don't proceed)
- Added helpful error message showing expected group file path
- Updated tests/groups/core.txt to match latest (287 tests, was 285)

This prevents situations where:
- Windows CI runs 390 tests instead of 93 (@windows)
- Linux CI runs 390 tests instead of 18 (@linux)
- macOS CI runs 390 tests instead of 25 (@macos)

If a group file is missing or fails to load, the test run will now
immediately fail with a clear error instead of silently running all tests.

files.patch:
@@ -206,6 +206,7 @@ setcomps
 shelve
 shlex

+smtplib
 smtpnet
 socketserver
 sort
@@ -256,6 +257,7 @@ unpack
